pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and JHipster dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may lack full compatibility with Java 21 or required features for the target JHipster version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated jackson-module-jaxb-annotations with jackson-module-jakarta-xmlbind-annotations for Jakarta EE namespace compliance.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Boot/Jakarta stacks; using it causes compile errors or runtime classpath issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer JDKs and Maven compiler plugin versions; using them may trigger warnings or errors in strict environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add release flag to maven-surefire-plugin configuration to ensure tests compile/run with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, tests might not be compiled with the correct Java version settings, potentially causing runtime failures on Java 21 specific features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a newer snapshot version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not support Java 21 class files, leading to instrumentation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures full support for Java 21 compilation features.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Security OAuth2 resource server configuration to use the new withDefaults() API required by Spring Boot 3.3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method jwt() without arguments is deprecated or removed in Spring Security 6.3+ (Spring Boot 3.3), causing a compile error or requiring explicit default configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add static import for Spring Security Customizer.withDefaults to support the updated configuration syntax.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is used in the updated configuration line but was not previously imported, causing a compile error.
